paragraphs: After experiencing the full spectrum of development—from hands-on engineering to management—as a core team member, I took the leap and started my freelance journey in 2026. While I used to be based in Tokyo, the freedom from location constraints has allowed me to relocate to the beautiful city of Matsumoto in Nagano Prefecture, where I now operate.
My core philosophy is to 'work with joy.' I truly believe that for me to enjoy what I do, the team must be having fun, and our users must enjoy the journey just as much.

This site feels more like a space for self-expression than a traditional portfolio. If anything here resonates with you, please feel free to reach out—whether it's for a casual chat, shared interests, or a project. (Though, I certainly won't complain if it's about a work opportunity!)

berserk.label: Beherit will cry soon - Berserk Style

hokuto.alt: Fist of the North Star-style profile image
hokuto.label: No sleeves needed - Fist of the North Star Style

develop-vue-spring-boot.description: My very first project as a freelancer. I'm currently developing a relatively standard web application using Vue.js and Spring Boot.

start-freelancing.description: I decided to go freelance to lean into my personal interests even more. I was genuinely surprised to find that almost all the paperwork could be wrapped up online, and I've been having fun figuring everything out, including tax optimization.

move-to-matsumoto.description: With location constraints gone, I thought, 'Why not live near the ski resorts?' and relocated to Matsumoto, Nagano. Since I'm a city boy at heart, I looked for an urban area close to the mountains, but it turned out to be a bit too far for a casual weekend trip (haha). That said, living in a beautiful city surrounded by mountains is truly incredible.

adopt-a-dog.description: On a whim, I decided to adopt a dog. He's a Shih Tzu mix, and honestly, his rock-solid health has been an absolute lifesaver.

start-skiing.description: Started skiing. Volkl for planks and Dalbello for boots are my absolute favorites. Currently aiming for the Olympics.

join-consulting-firm.description: Joined a consulting firm. Having started my career from a carefree freelancer without thinking too much, I felt like I had finally checked all the boxes as a corporate employee. The environment relied heavily on pure brute force, but it was fun in its own way.

join-salesforce-partner-firm.description: The company was packed with brilliant engineers. Looking back after wrapping up a full development cycle, you sometimes think, 'Wait, couldn't I have just built this alone?'—and this company was actually capable of operating with that exact level of agility. Well, until we got acquired by a mega-corporation. Also, I didn't really like Salesforce.

work-as-a-programming-instructor.description: While at an IT staffing agency, I somehow ended up conducting rookie training for system development, teaching at a kids' coding school, and handling marketing.

assignment-to-ishigaki.description: I thought I joined an IT staffing agency, but for some reason, we ended up building a hotel on Ishigaki Island. I lived there on and off for about a year and a half. It was truly, deeply an incredible place.

start-golfing.description: Started golfing. Apparently, if you break into the world's top 50, you get a ticket to the Masters, so that's the goal. Right now, I'm probably ranked around 43.2 millionth.

start-career.description: I was just living a carefree life as a freelancer/part-timer, but then I realized I’d never done an office job. I decided to look for work using my hobby of programming, and it turned out I could actually pull it off.

contact.intro: Thank you for visiting. For project inquiries, consultations, or any comments, please feel free to reach out using the form below.

contact.privacyConsentBefore: By submitting, you agree to the

collection.heading: Information we collect
collection.body: Through the contact form, we collect your name, email address, and message.

purpose.heading: How we use it
purpose.body: We use this information only to respond to your inquiry and for related follow-up communication.

thirdParty.heading: Third-party sharing
thirdParty.body: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as required by law. We use Resend to deliver contact form emails.

retention.heading: Retention
retention.body: We retain the information for as long as needed to handle your inquiry, then delete it appropriately.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: For questions about this policy, reach out via the contact form or email jumpei.kato.999@gmail.com.
